dailyLimit.title: Daily article limit reached
dailyLimit.bodyWithTime: No new articles can be fetched for now. Browse the articles already on your device — new articles unlock at {{time}}.
dailyLimit.body: No new articles can be fetched for now. Browse the articles already on your device — new articles unlock tomorrow.

mindfulness: Time to put the phone away.
Step away from the screen for a bit.
Stretch your body and ease your muscles.
Consider closing this app and going outside.
Drink some water and stay hydrated.
Give your eyes a break from the phone.
Put the device down and do something creative.
Maybe it's time to set the phone aside.
Move your body, however feels good.
Your phone will be here later. Be present now.
feed.analysedArticles: {{processed}} {{articleWord}} were published in the last 24 hours, {{analysed}} articles were analysed for you, and {{impactful}} found relevant for you.
feed.analysedArticlesPending: {{processed}} {{articleWord}} were published in the last 24 hours.
feed.noiseRemovedSummary: {{count}} decoy {{articleWord}} were filtered out before analysis.

processing.errorFlash: We couldn’t load the latest content. Please try again.

headlines: Fetching today’s articles onto your phone…
Getting today’s stories ready for you…
An AI is reading each article to see which ones matter to you.
Your request is encrypted — only your phone holds the key.
Writing a short note for each relevant story.
You can step away — we’ll notify you when it’s ready.
Your phone is scoring these stories for you.
This happens entirely on your device — nothing leaves it.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.enableDescription: Enable notifications to stay updated with personalized news
notifications.permissionDenied: If you previously denied notification permissions, you'll need to enable them in your device settings.
notifications.timeDescription: Choose when you'd like to receive notifications for processing your news
notifications.timeDescriptionOnboarding: Choose when you'd like to catch up on your news
timeNudges: News works best in one or two focused moments a day.
You don't need to check constantly — we'll have it ready when you are.
Fewer, calmer check-ins beat an all-day drip.
Pick times that fit your day — Mera does the gathering.
notifications.permissionRequiredDescription: Please enable notifications in your device Settings app under Mera.
notifications.setupFailedDescription: Unable to register for push notifications. Please try again.

notifications.disabledDescription: You will no longer receive push notifications.

language.title: Language
language.appLanguageDescription: Used for the app interface and translating news content
language.languagePacksIos: Translation models are managed by your device. You only need to download the model for your selected language — iOS handles the rest.
language.languagePacksIosPath: Settings → General → Language & Region → Translation Languages
language.languagePacksAndroid: Translation models (~30MB each) are downloaded automatically when you first translate to a new language.
language.restartDescription: The app needs to restart to apply the language change.
language.packMissingBanner: This language needs an on-device translation pack. Mera processes everything locally, so your data never leaves your device. You can manage languages from your phone's settings.
language.watchGuide: Watch how to add language to your device
language.iosLanguageHint: Only selecting this language is not enough — you'll need to also select this language in the iOS language settings.

meraProtocol.title: Mera Protocol
meraProtocol.onDeviceUnavailableDownload: Download the model to enable on-device processing.
meraProtocol.onDeviceUnavailableDevice: Your device doesn't meet on-device requirements.
meraProtocol.injectNoiseDescription: Submits decoy topics alongside your real interests so the backend can't triangulate who you are from your topic list. Articles matching only decoy topics are dropped before they reach you.
meraProtocol.injectNoiseBeta: Beta — may slow down topic generation and reduce feed relevance.
meraProtocol.privacyDescription: Mera Protocol is always on. On-device mode runs inference fully offline on your phone. Cloud mode uses end-to-end encrypted inference — your data is encrypted on your device and only decrypted inside a secure enclave. Mera never sees your data.
meraProtocol.deviceSupportedDescription: Your device meets all requirements for on-device AI processing.
meraProtocol.deviceNotSupportedDescription: Your device doesn't meet on-device requirements. Cloud processing is still available.
meraProtocol.deleteDescription: This will remove the downloaded model (~2.7GB). You can re-download it later. If you're currently on on-device processing, you'll be switched to cloud.
meraProtocol.updateDescription: This will replace {{current}} with {{new}}. The current model will be removed and you'll need to download the new one.
meraProtocol.dlInProgressDescription: The model is already being downloaded.
meraProtocol.dlStartedDescription: Downloading in the background. You'll be notified when complete.
meraProtocol.dlCompleteDescription: The AI model is ready for use.
meraProtocol.dlFailedDescription: Failed to download the AI model. Please try again.
meraProtocol.modeUpdatedOnDeviceDescription: Mera Protocol is now running fully offline on your phone.
meraProtocol.modeUpdatedCloudDescription: Mera Protocol is now using end-to-end encrypted cloud inference.
meraProtocol.settingUpdateFailedDescription: Failed to update processing mode. Please try again.
meraProtocol.modelDeletedDescription: The AI model has been removed.
meraProtocol.deleteFailedDescription: Failed to delete the model. Please try again.
meraProtocol.modelUpdatedDescription: Switched to {{model}}. Download the model to use it.
meraProtocol.modelUpdateFailedDescription: Failed to update model. Please try again.

manageData.title: Manage Data
manageData.description: Delete specific pieces of your data. Each action shows exactly what it will clear, and whether it lives on this device or on our servers, before you confirm.
manageData.feedCacheDescription: Cached articles & scoring jobs on this device
manageData.feedCacheModalDescription: Clears the cached article feed on this device: suggestions, their fact links, and pending scoring jobs. The feed rebuilds from the server on the next refresh. Nothing else is affected, and no server data is touched.
manageData.factsDescription: Your facts and the topics they generate — on this device
manageData.factsModalDescription: Clears the facts you've added and the topics generated from them. Topics live only on this device — they're never stored on our servers. Your article feed is cleared too, since it's built from these topics, and rebuilds empty until you add new facts.
manageData.viewingHistoryDescription: Articles you've opened — on this device
manageData.viewingHistoryModalDescription: Clears the local log of articles you've opened. The Sources tab's "Publications you've been reading" card and the per-publication history will reset to empty. Nothing else is affected, and no server data is touched (this data never left your device).
manageData.wipeAllDescription: Reset everything on this device except your account
manageData.wipeAllModalDescription: Clears every piece of data stored on this device: feed cache, facts, topics, app settings, and reading history. You stay signed in and your account is kept — nothing is deleted from our servers.
manageData.deletedDescription: Selected data has been cleared successfully.
manageData.errorDescription: Failed to delete data. Please try again.

preferences.manageSettings: Manage your app settings and account
preferences.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?
preferences.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?
preferences.deleteAccountWarning: ⚠️ This action cannot be undone and will remove all your data.
preferences.finalConfirmationBody: This will permanently delete all your data.
preferences.accountDeletedDescription: Your account has been permanently deleted.
preferences.deletionFailedDescription: There was an issue deleting your account. Please try again.
preferences.signedOutDescription: You have been successfully signed out.
preferences.logoutFailedDescription: There was an issue signing out. Please try again.

configPanel.privacyOnDevice: Your facts and topics are stored exclusively on your device — AI inference runs entirely on-device via the Mera Protocol. Each time you need news, your topics are sent to our servers to fetch relevant articles; the server returns results without storing any of your data. Chat history is never saved; each session starts fresh. Switching devices or logging out means rebuilding your persona.
configPanel.privacyCloud: Your facts and topics are stored exclusively on your device. Cloud inference uses encrypted Trusted Execution Environments (TEE) — your data is encrypted on-device, processed in an isolated enclave, and decrypted only on your device. Each time you need news, your topics are sent to our servers to fetch relevant articles; the server returns results without storing any of your data. Chat history is never stored; each session starts fresh. Switching devices or logging out means rebuilding your persona.
configPanel.emptyStateMessage: Answer a few questions to build your profile
configPanel.factDeletedDescription: The fact and its tracked topics have been removed.
configPanel.deleteFailedDescription: Could not delete the fact. Please try again.
configPanel.deleteFactConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this fact?
configPanel.deleteFactWarning: This will also remove all the tracked topics generated from this fact.
configPanel.refreshSuggestionsSuccessDescription: New personalized suggestions are being generated.
configPanel.refreshSuggestionsFailedDescription: Could not refresh suggestions. Please try again.
configPanel.personaUpdatedRefreshHint: I see you've updated your persona, would you like me to regenerate your feed?
configPanel.addTopicDescription: Please enter the topic that you'd like to track for this fact. The App finds news based on your topic and understands its relevance based on the fact.
configPanel.generateMoreTopicsWarning: This will generate 10 more topics for this interest. Adding more topics may increase your AI usage. Mera recommends keeping only the topics you're really interested in and removing non-impactful topics for the best value.
configPanel.generateMoreTopicsFailedDescription: Couldn't generate new topics. Please try again.
configPanel.articleAnalysisDescription: You should be optimizing your Mera by reducing the total number of articles being analyzed as the more articles being analyzed the more you run out of usage.
configPanel.promoTooltip: You're free to test the Individual plan as part of our app launch. This is a limited-time offer.

errors.unexpectedError: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Unable to connect to the server. Check your network and API endpoint settings.
errors.feedError: Couldn't load your feed. Please try again.
errors.accountRestrictedDescription: Your account has been restricted. Please contact support.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.message: We can't reach the server to pick news for you. Check your connection — your feed will catch up on its own once you're back online.

server.title: Service unavailable
server.message: We couldn't reach the news service. This is usually brief — we'll keep trying and your feed will update on its own.

generic.title: Couldn't update your feed
generic.message: Something went wrong while picking news for you. We'll keep trying — pull down to refresh if it continues.

chat.inferenceError: We're having trouble reaching the Mera inference service right now. Please try again in a moment.

personaChat.introMessage: Hi! I'm Mera, your personal news assistant. If you'd like, share anything about yourself — where you live, what you do for work, hobbies you follow, stocks you track, places your family lives. Or just say 'help me set up' and I'll walk you through it.

floatingChat.title: Mera
floatingChat.chipAddLocationMessage: I want to tell you where I live
floatingChat.chipShowFactsMessage: What do you currently know about me?
floatingChat.chipHelpSetupMessage: Help me set up my persona
floatingChat.aiUsageNotice: This assistant helps set up your news preferences. Attempting to manipulate or misuse it may get your account blocked pending review.

requestUnblock.warningText: The chat history that led to this block will be sent to our team for review. If the violation is found to be severe, your account may be terminated. Please explain what happened below.
requestUnblock.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us what happened and why your account should be unblocked...
requestUnblock.submittedConfirmation: Your request has been submitted and is pending review. We'll re-check your status when you tap Refresh.
requestUnblock.alreadyPending: You already have an unblock request pending review.
requestUnblock.error: Couldn't submit your request. Please try again.

articleFeedback.thumbsUpMessage: I liked this article: "{{title}}". I'd like to see more suggestions like this.
articleFeedback.thumbsDownMessage: I don't want articles like this: "{{title}}". Help me adjust my suggestions.
articleFeedback.improveMessage: This suggestion could be better: "{{title}}". Help me tune my suggestions.
articleFeedback.intro: What can I do for you? I can explain why you received this suggestion, or help you get better ones.
articleFeedback.introArticle: What can I do for you? I can help you tune your news suggestions based on this article.
articleFeedback.chipWhy: Why did I receive this suggestion?
articleFeedback.chipWhyMessage: Why did I receive this suggestion?
articleFeedback.chipDontWantMessage: I don't want this suggestion. What should we change so I stop getting articles like this?
articleFeedback.chipMoreLikeThisMessage: I want more articles like this one. What should we add to my interests?
articleFeedback.proposalExpired: This proposal is no longer active
articleFeedback.actionFeatureRequest: Send feature request to the Mera team

publicationVisits.tooltipIntro: Mera keeps track of your reading patterns for you — and it lives only on your device.

publicationVisits.screenIntro: Mera tracks your reading patterns - only on your device for 30 days. This gives you a clearer picture of which publications matter most to you, so you can consider supporting the ones that directly benefit you.

savedSuggestions.note: These articles are saved only on your device. Add or remove them anytime — they stay here until you delete them.

personaAudit.title: Persona change log
personaAudit.subtitle: Every change to your interests
personaAudit.empty: No changes yet. As Mera tunes your interests, every change shows up here.
personaAudit.revertConfirmBody: This undoes the change and restores your persona to how it was before.
personaAudit.revertFailedBody: This change can't be reverted right now.

calibration.notificationBody: Mera's on-device ranking disagreed with its own judgement {{count}} times lately. Recalibrate to close the gap.
calibration.chatIntro: I've been second-guessing how I rank your news lately. Want me to recalibrate so my scoring better matches your taste? Tap "Recalibrate now" and I'll tune it — you can always undo it.
calibration.successBody: I tuned my ranking to better match your taste.
calibration.noChangeBody: Your ranking already looks well-tuned — no changes needed.
calibration.failedBody: I couldn't finish recalibrating just now. I'll try again later.

feedbackTree.seenAck: Got it — we'll show fewer you've seen
feedbackTree.nudgeBrowse: Look for related coverage from other sources

conflict.title: Possible conflict

hygiene.notificationBody_one: Mera found {{count}} cleanup for your profile.
hygiene.notificationBody_other: Mera found {{count}} cleanups for your profile.
hygiene.title: Persona health
hygiene.subtitle: Suggested cleanups
hygiene.intro: Mera found a few things worth tidying up. Accept the ones you agree with.
hygiene.effectDuplicate: Removes the duplicate and keeps the stronger one.
hygiene.effectTooBroad: Lowers this interest's weight so it pulls in fewer off-topic stories.
hygiene.effectStaleTopic: Retires this quiet topic. You can restore it from the change log.
hygiene.effectStaleFact: Removes this fact — none of its topics are active anymore.
hygiene.appliedBody: Your profile was tidied up. See the change log to review.
